article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025

briefs.title: Burnaby Housing Agreement locks 47 non-market rental units at 5860 Olive Avenue
briefs.summary: Burnaby Council adopted Bylaw 14751 on June 24, 2025, authorizing a Housing Agreement with Polygon Onyx Homes Ltd. that legally binds 47 non-market rental units in a 34-storey tower to affordability and tenant-eligibility requirements under the Local Government Act.
briefs.action_required: If you own or manage rental property in this development, review the Housing Agreement's rent and tenant-eligibility obligations immediately.
briefs.article_title: Bylaw 14751 — Housing Agreement (5860 Olive Avenue) Bylaw 2025
